cards.title:
Select 
 Your Journey
cards.description: We understand that excellence is personal. A marriage proposal demands absolute privacy; a family expedition requires precision logistics. Select the ascent engineered for your story.

subtitles.classic: Ideal for: Solo travellers, couples, and groups of friends seeking a shared perspective.
subtitles.journey: Ideal for: Solo travellers, couples, and groups of friends seeking camaraderie.
subtitles.transport: Ideal for: International guests and travellers seeking a fluid, high-standard journey without logistical concern.
subtitles.open: Don’t give them a thing; give them a memory. Purchase a flight experience now, and let the recipient decide when they want to wake up and touch the sky. You receive a digital boarding pass instantly, and they have a full year to book their sunrise.
subtitles.proposal: Ideal for: Discerning couples seeking the definitive setting for life’s most significant question.
subtitles.birthday: Ideal for: Those seeking to mark a new chapter with a fresh, sublime perspective.
subtitles.anniversary: Ideal for: Couples and families marking a significant anniversary with a gesture of distinction.
subtitles.vip: Ideal for: International guests and private groups seeking an uncompromising standard of exclusivity.
subtitles.corporate: IFrom incentive trips to brand activations (like our work with Telcel). We offer fully insured, invoice-ready operations with logistical precision.

descriptions.classic: The Experience: Join a select group of adventurers in our signature compartmented baskets. Unlike standard open designs, our Cameron Balloons fleet ensures that every guest enjoys a dedicated vantage point with ample personal space. It is the definitive balance of a social atmosphere and sophisticated comfort.
descriptions.journey: The Experience: We designed this for the traveller with zero patience for logistics. We handle the round-trip transport, guide you through the pyramids, and immerse you in local traditions. Includes a survival kit (hat & water) so you just focus on the view.
descriptions.transport: The Experience: Designed for those who demand excellence without compromise. We orchestrate your entire itinerary: from private door-to-door transport and a precision flight at the valley’s first light, to a buffet breakfast and direct access to the archaeological site. Seamless execution, from initial pickup to your final return.
descriptions.open: The Experience: Designed for the traveller who wants the full story without the logistical stress. We orchestrate the entire itinerary: from the door-to-door transport and the precision flight at morning first light, to your direct access to the pyramids. Seamless execution, from pickup to return.
descriptions.proposal: The Experience: Excellence is not an accident; it is engineered. We ensure your moment is flawless, orchestrating the unveiling of your "Will You Marry Me?" banner with absolute precision while you enjoy total privacy in the sky. From gourmet details and fresh floral arrangements to professional photography, we manage the complexity so you can focus on the memory. You simply bring the ring; we provide the perfection
descriptions.birthday: The Experience: Why celebrate on the ground when you can soar above it? Begin your personal year with the valley’s first light. We orchestrate every festive detail: from a personalised 'Happy Birthday' banner upon landing and a celebratory symbolic cake, to a traditional toast. A sophisticated start to your next journey, engineered for absolute safety
descriptions.anniversary: The Experience: Traditional celebrations are predictable; the serenity of the Teotihuacán Valley is not. We curate a sophisticated atmosphere to honour your journey together. Your flight is followed by a gourmet buffet breakfast at 'El Jaguar' and a traditional toast. To ensure the memory lasts, we include a personalised banner and a digital photography package. A shared moment, engineered to perfection.
descriptions.vip: The Experience: Our most prestigious service, engineered for those who demand absolute discretion and precision. We orchestrate a seamless private journey: from your hotel door to the serene heights of the Teotihuacán Valley, followed by an exclusive brunch at the renowned Mayahuel. Enhance the adventure with chilled Champagne and a historian-led exploration of the archaeological site. Pure exclusivity, flawlessly delivered.
descriptions.corporate: The Experience: Why celebrate on the ground when you can float above it? Start your personal new year with a sunrise spectacle. We handle the festive details: a "Happy Birthday" banner upon landing, a celebratory slice of cake, and the warmth of a traditional Mexican morning.

includes.classic: Includes: 45-60 min flight, Coffee Break, Sparkling Toast
includes.journey: Includes: Round-trip Transport (CDMX), Flight, Breakfast, Pyramid Tour & Tickets, Traveler Gift.
includes.transport: Includes: Round-trip Transport (CDMX), 40-min Flight, Welcome Coffee, Sparkling Toast, Breakfast Buffet, Pyramid Entrance Tickets, Certificate.
includes.open: Includes: Round-trip Transport (CDMX), 40-min Flight, Welcome Coffee, Sparkling Toast, Breakfast Buffet, Pyramid Entrance Tickets, Certificate.
includes.proposal: Includes: Private Flight, Surprise proposal Deployment, 24-Rose Bouquet, Photo & Video Package, Sparkling Toast, Breakfast.
includes.anniversary: Includes: Flight, "Happy Anniversary" Banner, Welcome Coffee, Sparkling Toast, Breakfast Buffet, Flight Certificate, Insurance.
includes.birthday: Includes: Flight, "Happy Birthday" Banner, Cake Slice, Welcome Coffee, Sparkling Toast, Breakfast Buffet, Flight Certificate.
includes.vip: Includes: Private Transport, Private Flight, Champagne, Waiter Service & Canapés, Private Cave & Pyramid Tour, Brunch, Photo/Video Package.
includes.corporate: Includes: Flight, "Happy Birthday" Banner, Cake Slice, Welcome Coffee, Sparkling Toast, Breakfast Buffet, Flight Certificate.
